details: Gathered all primary evidence: breadcrumbs (4 agents), execution log (builder), REPORT.md, op_design.md, .tdd_state.json, git history (12 commits this run)

All evidence gathered. Timing extracted from breadcrumbs and git. 12 commits this run (2026-03-11). Total wall time ~71 min (17:06-18:17). Phase 4 (TDD) was 32.5 min. 1 hard + 1 free retry total. Now writing report.
Self-reflection report written to self_reflection.md. 3 new issues appended to pipeline-improvements.md (#12, #13, #14). 5 issues found, 5 recommendations, 5 positives identified.
